email.reply_to_email_helptext: Customers will send to this email.
email.sender_email_helptext: This email will be used to send to your customers.
email.title: Email setting
email.send_email_from_source: Send review request email to order from:
email.email_blocklist_helptext: Request & reminder emails will not be sent to these emails
email.block_email_placeholder: Press Enter to add new email
email.unblock_message_title: Send emails which were blocked previously
email.unblock_message: Do you want to send the emails which were blocked previously, or cancel sending them?
email.order_tag_blocklist_helptext: Request & reminder emails will not send emails from orders containing tags in the above list

email_setting.sub_title: Fine-tune your email settings for enhanced productivity and communications
email_setting.title: Email setting

empty_page.description: Link your custom email domain to send messages from your brand’s email address. This will enhance your brand’s professionalism and help your messages stand out in recipients’ inboxes.

overview_page.config_dns_settings_helptext: Insert the following MX, SPF, and DKIM records into your DNS settings to authenticate {{domain}}.

record_config.name: HOST NAME

mx.title: MX record
mx.sub_title: Set two MX records that align with the details below:

spf.title: SPF record
spf.sub_title: Include a SPF record that matches the details below:

dkim.title: DKIM record
dkim.sub_title: Include a DKIM record that matches the details below:

dmarc.title: DMARC record
dmarc.sub_title: Include a DMARC record that matches the details below:

custom_from.title: Custom from record
custom_from.sub_title: Include a CUSTOM FROM record that matches the details below:

record_config.notice: Notice: Your {{config}} record hasn't been verified yet. It may take a few hours or even up to 72 hours for DNS records to fully propagate.

modal_add_domain.title: Add your email address
modal_add_domain.input_label: Enter the email address you’d like to use for sending messages.
modal_add_domain.validate_domain: You can only add your own domain. Trusthop does not support adding public domains (e.g., gmail.com, yahoo.com)

modal_delete_domain.title: Delete custom domain?
modal_delete_domain.description: If you delete your custom domain, you will revert to using the default domain and will no longer be able to use this domain. This action cannot be undone. Do you want to continue?

unsubscribe_management.title: Unsubscribe management
unsubscribe_management.subtitle: Track and manage customers who have unsubscribed from your review request emails.
unsubscribe_management.delete_unsubscribe_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this email(s)? This action cannot be undone.
unsubscribe_management.no_unsubscribe_description: Information about customers who have unsubscribed from emails will appear here

profile.store_email_helptext: We'll use this address if we need to contact you about your account.
profile.store_name_helptext: Appears in email headers without a logo added.
profile.title: Profile

general_setting.sub_title: Configure your account with your email, logo, and social media
general_setting.title: General setting

social.helptext: Includes social channel in email footer
social.title: Social setting

mobile_apps.title: Mobiles apps
mobile_apps.sub_title: Includes social channel in Email footer

social_links.sub_title: Customize your social links settings to share and communicate effectively with your customers
social_links.title: Social links

review_action.title: Export/delete reviews
review_action.subtitle: Export and delete all reviews on your store
review_action.export_review_helptext: It will take a few minutes for the reviews to be exported. The export file will be sent to your email at <1>{{email}}</1>.
review_action.delete_all_helptext: This action cannot be undone, so please make sure before deleting reviews.
review_action.delete_confirm: This action cannot be undone, so please make sure before deleting reviews

auto_publish_reviews.title: Auto-publish reviews
auto_publish_reviews.sub_title: Select which reviews you want to auto-publish. Any changes will only affect new reviews.
auto_publish_reviews.auto_publish_reviews_if: Auto publish new reviews to Store if:

new_review_notification.title: New review notification
new_review_notification.sub_title: Receive email notifications for new review submissions. This does not include reviews added through import
new_review_notification.send_email_to_merchant_if: Send email to merchant if customers leave a review
new_review_notification.receive_email: Receive email notifications for negative review submissions

protect_reviews.title: Protect your reviews
protect_reviews.sub_title: Set relevant keywords to safeguard your reviews and prevent sensitive content like pornography, violence, terrorism, fraud, phishing links, or malware from appearing in them.
protect_reviews.block_additional_words_description: We've already blocked the most common profanities. Add more words by typing into the box below.
protect_reviews.add_word_placeholder: Type a keyword and press enter

auto_send_email.title: Auto send email to customer
auto_send_email.sub_title: When you reply to a customer review in the review management section, the system will automatically send an email to that customer with the content of your reply
auto_send_email.send_email_to_merchant_when_source: Send emails to customers when you reply to their reviews via source:

review_translate.title: Translate the reviews content
review_translate.sub_title: A Translate button will be displayed on reviews. Allowing buyers to easily translate into their native language

multi_lang.title: Translate the widget language
multi_lang.sub_title: The widget's content will automatically be translated into the language of shoppers in each market your store serves.
multi_lang.description: By default, all review widgets will display in English. When you enable this feature, the language displayed on the widget will automatically switch to the language of the shopper in the country they are visiting.

filter_review.title: Filter reviews
filter_review.sub_title: The reviews that meet the conditions will be imported
filter_review.skip_review_value: AliExpress, Ali AliExpress, Fraud, Scam, Fake, Counterfeit, Knockoff, Imitation, Replica, Worse

generate_title.title: Generate title reviews
generate_title.sub_title: Automaticaly  generate review titles based on the star ratings if the source doesn't have a title

gg_shopping.title: Google product review
gg_shopping.sub_title: Showcase glowing customer testimonials directly on your Google Shopping listings to catch more attention and build trust.

google_product_review.title: Google product review feed
google_product_review.generate_feed_helptext: Modify updating schedule to align with settings in Google Merchant Center

advanced_setting.title: Advanced setting
advanced_setting.add_mpn_helptext: This will include the same SKU value in Shopify admin

icon_and_corner.title: Display setting
icon_and_corner.subtitle: When an attribute below is changed, the entire system will be updated accordingly

reviewer_name.title: Reviewer name display
reviewer_name.sub_title: Select default reviewer name input from the form or customize manually

default.label: Default
default.helptext: Auto display the reviewer's name from the review form

manually.label: Manually
manually.helptext: Choose a defaultname display format. Then apply it to all reviewers

reviewer_avt_format.title: Reviewer avatar setting
reviewer_avt_format.sub_title: Set your reviewer's avatar by picking colors or using alternative illustrations

colorful_avt.label: Colorful avatar
colorful_avt.helptext: Auto generate avatar from color wheel

base_color_avt.label: Base color avatar
base_color_avt.helptext: Create reviewer avatar with a base color

gravatar_avt.label: Gravatar avatar
gravatar_avt.helptext: Use Gravatar to display reviewer avatar

review_date_format.title: Review date format
review_date_format.sub_title: Set up the date format across all your widgets.

rich_snippet.title: Rich snippet
rich_snippet.description: Enable users to create Rich Snippets, enhancing search visibility by displaying additional information like ratings, prices, and availability directly in search results, driving more engagement and improving SEO.
rich_snippet.seo_description: These snippet apps automatically sync with Trustshop review snippets.
rich_snippet.text_field_label: Enter your product link to check the snippet

partner_list.langwill: Translate your store into 138 languages and auto-convert currencies to grow sales worldwide.
partner_list.ilana: Optimize your SEO traffic by highlighting your reviews, prices, & business details in search results.
partner_list.shopify_flow: Customize your store and automate your tasks using Shopify Flow’s low-code editor.
